word: H3651 - כֵּן - kên - kane - After that

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּן

Transliteration: kên

Phonetic: kane

BDB Definition:

  1. so, therefore, thus (adverb)
    1. thus, so
    2. just so
    3. therefore
    4. so ... as (paired with adverb)
    5. then
    6. forasmuch as (in phrase)
    7. (with preposition)
      1. therefore, this being so (specific)
      2. hitherto
      3. therefore, on this ground (general)
      4. afterwards
      5. in such case
  2. right, just, honest, true, veritable (adjective)
    1. right, just, honest
    2. correct
    3. true, veritable
    4. true!, right!, correct! (in assent)

Origin: from H3559

TWOT entry: 964a,964b

Part(s) of speech:
